spec_match.rationale: Directly implements a timing benchmark registering pointerdown, touchstart, and click offsets, accurately reflecting the speculation rule arming window.

interactive.rationale: Provides two tap targets that measure finger down-to-up offsets on click, dynamically displaying the exact millisecond gap.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Explains how mobile touch actions lacked standard mousedown events, losing critical prefetch head starts before Chrome 138.

edge_cases.rationale: Captures pointercancel events correctly (e.g., when scroll starts instead of a click), reflecting realistic mobile gestures.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5079361929347072 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Fits inside clean panels, integrates custom interactive timeline log styles, and conforms to accessibility contrast rules.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
